description: The cluster was recently upgraded to Kubernetes v1.28, which removed several deprecated API versions. As a result, the deployment for the legacy billing application is completely broken. The legacy YAML manifests are located at /home/ga/Desktop/legacy-billing-manifests/. Refactor these manifests to use modern, supported API versions (networking.k8s.io/v1, autoscaling/v2, policy/v1), addressing all structural schema changes required by the new APIs. Deploy the application successfully into a new namespace named 'legacy-billing'. You can use Rancher at https://localhost (admin / Admin12345678!) or kubectl directly.
